summary: First-iteration testing. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases passed covering health, auth (signup domain gating, login admin/student, /me), items CRUD + owner/admin authorization, search/filter, keyword+location matching with notifications for both reporters, notifications read-all, full conversation flow (start, list, get, send, notification to receiver) and admin endpoints (403 for student, 200 for admin). MongoDB hygiene verified - no _id / password_hash in any response. Frontend: landing page renders correctly with 3 CTAs (I lost / I found / Browse items), Browse page loads the 2 seed items with filters visible, Profile page renders student info, Login form is visible. Full login->redirect automation could not be confirmed because `Sign in` label ambiguously matches both the header link and the form submit button (test selector issue, not an app bug). Recommend adding data-testid to login form submit button for deterministic automation.
action_items: Add data-testid attributes to login form (email-input, password-input, login-submit-button) and report-item form fields so automated tests can reliably target the form submit vs the header 'Sign in' link (both share the same accessible name).

Consider adding data-testid to Report Lost/Found, Browse filter Apply/Reset, Contact Owner dialog, Messages list items, Admin table delete buttons, and Header notifications bell for end-to-end testability.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 576 lines - acceptable now but will cross 700 soon; plan to split into routers/auth.py, routers/items.py, routers/messages.py, routers/admin.py.
JWT_SECRET falls back to 'change-me' if env missing - should fail fast in production (raise on startup instead of default).
/api/conversations/{conv_id}/messages accepts raw dict payload - should use a Pydantic model (e.g. MessageBody { text: str }) for consistent validation.

find_matches() filters candidates by exact same category; if categories differ slightly (e.g. 'Wallet/Cash' vs 'Wallet') no match is surfaced. Consider a looser category bucket or fallback to word-overlap only.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' combined with allow_credentials=True - browsers will reject credentialed requests; set explicit origin list in production.
Password policy not enforced on signup (min length, complexity). Consider validating in SignupRequest.

success_rate.frontend: partially verified - landing/browse/profile confirmed; deep auth-gated flows need data-testid to automate

test_credentials: Used admin@ietgkp.edu/Admin@123 and student@ietgkp.edu/Test@1234 from /app/memory/test_credentials.md - both work on backend.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed items and delete them in the same test; no residual test data expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green via pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (run: pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v). For frontend automation, the Login page has a header 'Sign in' link AND a form 'Sign in' submit button which both match role=button/name='Sign in' - use nth selector or add data-testid='login-submit-button'. Report/Admin/Messages pages require auth; without successful login automation they redirect to /login and appear to have few inputs. After main agent adds data-testids, rerun frontend flow tests.
rca of the issue: No functional bug found. Frontend automation limitation is due to duplicate 'Sign in' accessible names (header link + form submit) - resolve by adding data-testid to the form submit button.
